description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node Docker image and caching the node_modules directory. Define a single stage called deploy and a job named pages that runs in this stage. The job should execute the global before_script `npm install` then run the script commands `npm run deploy`, `echo 'Nothing to do...'`, `mkdir -p ./public/`, and `cp -r ./dist/ index.html ./public/`. It should publish the `public` directory as a pages artifact and only run on the master branch.
